chunks.text: CP NO.D-6661/2020 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 15.09.2021 Mr. Aleem Ghaus advocate for petitioner. Mr. Safdar Ali Depar, AAG................ Matter pertains to appointment of petitioners on differently abled persons’ quota. Since differently abled persons having different disqualifications for different reasons are suffering miseries due to their disabilities and inspite of their education, they have not been accommodated hence they used to file petitions insisting that they shall be appointed on disability quota. Accordingly, Chief Secretary Sindh shall direct all Secretaries who shall prepare lists of all vacancies within their departments in terms that what is the total number of positions and ratio of the positions in number with clarity whether on the reserved positions, differently abled persons have been appointed or those posts are lying vacant and whether those persons appointed have been accommodated by providing them wheelchairs or other facilities as per their disability. This exercise shall be completed within fifteen days. To come up on 30.09.2021. J U D G E J U D G E IK
